title: ucase-release-gate-result-v1
description: The decision emitted by the release gate: per-row required_for_release status, the pass/fail verdict, the set of blocked rows, and the policy mode. In release mode a required (required_for_release: true) row that is not FRESH sets policy_block and fails the gate (see deriveFreshness policy_block and releaseGating.test.ts).

status.description: Freshness status of a row at gate time.

required_for_release.description: Whether the row's approval_policy declares required_for_release.

policy_block.description: True when this row blocks release (required + not FRESH in release mode).

reasons.description: Human-readable reasons the row is not FRESH or is otherwise blocked (optional). Includes AUTHORITY_INSUFFICIENT when a FRESH required row is blocked by the release-gate authority requirement.

authority_type.description: OPTIONAL. The authority.type of the row's matching FRESH proof (CI-neutral provenance; see authority.schema.json). Present only when the proof carries an authority block. Absent when there is no matching proof or it predates the authority block.

authority_protected_ref.description: OPTIONAL. The authority.protected_ref tri-state of the matching FRESH proof: true/false when the provider attested the protected-branch state, null when unknown. protected_ref is provider-attested where available and otherwise unknown.

policy_mode.description: The freshness/gate policy mode the decision was evaluated under.

passed.description: Pass/fail verdict: true when no row sets policy_block.

blocked_row_ids.description: Ordered row ids that block the release.

authority_requirement.description: OPTIONAL echo of the CI-neutral release-gate authority requirement this decision was evaluated under (from workspace-config release_gate). Absent when no authority requirement is configured (off by default). The trust model is CI-NEUTRAL — only the proof's authority shape is inspected, not which provider produced it.

required_authority.description: When "ci", a required row's matching FRESH proof must carry authority.type === "ci".

require_protected_ref.description: When true, a required row's matching FRESH proof must carry authority.protected_ref === true.

reasons: row has a registered binding but no trusted proof event
AUTHORITY_INSUFFICIENT: release gate requires authority.type === "ci" and authority.protected_ref === true, but the matching proof was minted locally
